news.summary: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

news.headline: Europe, Canada pull together in Yerevan in Trump's shadow
news.summary: European leaders talked up independence on defence and closer ties with Canada Monday, as they gathered in Armenia for a summit clouded by US threats to cut military support. news.headline: Car ploughs into pedestrians in central Leipzig, Germany
news.summary: A driver struck a group of people on a street in Leipzig, Germany, killing two and injuring several.
